name: Sky Quarry Inc.
business: Sky Quarry operates a regional refinery (Eagle Springs Refinery) producing diesel, vacuum gas oil (VGO), naphtha and liquid paving asphalt from crude oil suppliers in the Uintah basin. It also has a development-stage division (P.R. Springs) focused on recycling waste asphalt shingles and remediating oil-saturated sands using its proprietary ECOSolv technology, aiming to produce crude oil and aggregate. The company sells refined products to wholesale, bulk, and retail customers primarily across Nevada, Utah, and California.

exposures.sentence: We operate a regional refinery (the Eagle Springs Refinery) producing diesel, vacuum gas oil (VGO), naphtha and liquid paving asphalt from crude oil suppliers in the Uintah basin near Nevada and Utah.

We have a separate division in the development-stage (P.R. Springs) formed to deploy technologies to facilitate the recycling of waste asphalt shingles and remediation of oil-saturated sands and soil, providing sustainable refined crude products.
We have developed a process for separating oil from oily sands and other oil-bearing solids utilizing a proprietary solvent, which we refer to as our ECOSolv technology or the ECOSolv process.
2020 Resources holds a 100% undivided interest in contiguous asphalt bitumen leases covering approximately 5,880 acres in the PR Spring region of Uintah County, Utah.

catalysts.event: Eagle Springs Refinery expected to be operational by end of second quarter 2026
catalysts.sentence: We expect the facility to be operational by the end of the second quarter of 2026.
The Reverse Stock Split was effective on March 15, 2026, at 11:59pm Eastern Time.

catalysts.event: Regained compliance with Nasdaq minimum bid price on March 30, 2026
catalysts.sentence: On March 30, 2026, the Company was notified by Nasdaq that the Company has regained compliance with the Rule, and that the matter was now closed (the Compliance Notice).

catalysts.event: Completed sale of First Tranche of Series A Preferred Stock in October 2025
catalysts.sentence: On October 1, 2025, Foreland completed the sale of 1,182 shares for aggregate proceeds to date of $416,700 from the sale of 4,167 shares.

tamClaims.claim: About 15.1 million tons of waste shingles are generated annually in the U.S., with over 96% ending up in landfills.
tamClaims.sentence: According to a report by the United States Environmental Protection Agency titled Advancing Sustainable Materials Management: Assessing Trends in Materials Generation and Management in the United States dated December 2020, about 15.1 million tons of waste shingles are generated annually.

tamClaims.claim: U.S. residential and commercial roofing materials market size was estimated at $16 billion in 2024, growing at 4.5% CAGR through 2030.
tamClaims.sentence: According to Grand View Research, the U.S. residential and commercial roofing materials market size was estimated at $16 billion in 2024 and is anticipated to grow at a compound annual growth rate of 4.5% from 2024 to 2030.

tamClaims.claim: RAP usage in 2022 reduced the need for an estimated 26.9 million barrels of asphalt binder and more than 93 million tons of aggregate.
tamClaims.sentence: RAP usage during the 2022 paving season reduced the need for an estimated 26.9 million barrels of asphalt binder and more than 93 million tons of aggregate.

tamClaims.claim: United States has an estimated 76 billion barrels of oil-in-place from bitumen and heavy oil in oil sands resources.
tamClaims.sentence: The United States has an estimated 76 billion barrels of oil-in-place ( OIP ) from bitumen and heavy oil contained in oil sands resources (OIP are not estimates of reserves or recoverable resources).

tamClaims.claim: Utah has total oil sands resource estimates ranging from 23 to 32 billion barrels of OIP from bitumen and heavy oil.
tamClaims.sentence: In the United States, Utah is known to have the largest oil sands deposits, with total resource estimates ranging from 23 to 32 billion barrels of OIP from bitumen and heavy oil contained in oil sands formations and deposits.
